BudgetBuddy
✨ 100% Free — No credit card required

Budget smarter.
Stress less.

BudgetBuddy gives you everything paid apps charge $10–15/month for — expense tracking, envelope budgeting, savings goals, charts and more. Completely free, forever.

💸
Track Every Dollar
Log income and expenses by category. See exactly where your money goes with clear charts and a monthly summary table.
👛
Envelope Budgeting
Set monthly limits per category. Progress bars fill as you spend and turn red when you're over — no surprises.
🎯
Savings Goals
Set a target, add funds as you save, and watch your progress bar grow. Works for anything from a vacation to a car.
💳
Debt Tracker
Add your loans and debts. BudgetBuddy calculates exactly how many months until you're debt free based on your payments.
👫
Shared Finances
Invite your partner or spouse with a simple code. Both of you see and manage the same budget in real time.
📊
Beautiful Charts
Bar charts, donut charts and an annual income vs expenses view. Switch between 1 month, 3 months, 6 months or a full year.

Help

BudgetBuddy v1.1 · Made with ❤️

Household
Shared Finances

Share your budget with a partner or spouse. You'll both have full access to the same transactions, budgets and goals.

👋
Welcome to BudgetBuddy!
Your personal finance companion. Let's take a quick tour so you know exactly how to use it. It only takes a minute!
🏠
Dashboard
Your home screen. See your monthly income, expenses and net balance at a glance. Charts show your spending over time and by category. The simulator lets you see how much you'd save by cutting a category.
💸
Transactions
Add your income and expenses here. Give each one a label, amount, category and date. Toggle "Recurring monthly" for bills that repeat every month — BudgetBuddy will remind you when they're due.
👛
Budget Envelopes
Set a monthly spending limit per category. A progress bar fills as you spend — it turns red if you go over. This is the best way to stop overspending in any area.
🎯
Savings Goals
Set a savings goal with a target amount and date. Add funds to it as you save. The progress bar fills up as you get closer — satisfying to watch grow!
⚙️
Settings
Set your name for a personalised greeting, switch between light and dark mode, choose your currency, manage categories, and export your data as CSV anytime.
💳
Debt Tracker
Add any debts you have — car loans, mortgages, student loans, credit cards. Enter the total amount, your monthly payment and interest rate. BudgetBuddy calculates exactly how many months until you're debt free!
👫
Shared Household
Budget together with your partner or spouse. Go to the Household page, create a household and share the 6-digit code with them. Once they join, you both see and manage the exact same transactions, budgets and goals.
🚀
You're all set!
Start by adding your first transaction. If you ever need this tutorial again, you can find it in Settings → Help. Good luck with your finances!

⚠️ Clear All Data?

This will permanently delete all transactions, budgets, goals and categories. This cannot be undone.
